channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Software
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle software bundles!

item.title: Business Intelligence Analyst by Packt
item.content:encoded:
Keep up in an ever-evolving world of tech and finance with a curated bundle of practical lessons from the experts at Packt. Rooted in modern data analytics and business intelligence, this collection will help you become an analysis mastermind in no time with fundamentals-based courses on advanced Google Analytics and more. Pay what you want for hot courses like Microsoft Power BI - The Complete Masterclass, Power BI Tips and Tricks , and beyond. Keep pace with an ever changing analytics landscape, and help support Hello World with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 14th, 2027

item.title: Massive Game Asset Music Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with the Massive Game Asset Music Bundle, featuring work from top creators Alec Shea, JDB Artist, Joel Steudler, and Murray Atkinson. Highlights from this extensive library of beta-ready assets include Epic Strings, JRPG and Fantasy Music Vol. 1-4, Inspirational Music Pack Vol. 1, and more. Explore a variety of genres, from Spanish guitars to supernatural strings and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

The license agreement for this bundle can be found here.

item.title: The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Looking for a little help crafting the rich worlds of your next game project? Then The Ultimate Giga Cosmos Bundle is the 1,000+ asset library you need! This cosmos-sized collection contains everything you need, from the steampunk assets within the Victorian Environment Megapack to fantasy alien castles and magical elven cities. Unleash your creative potential and bring your imagination to life like never before with a 1-month trial subscription to Cosmos, Leartes’ expansive selection of high-quality 3D assets! Pay what you want for the ultimate asset bundle and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 20th, 2027.

item.title: GameDev.tv's Game Jam Bundle
item.content:encoded: We’ve assembled a rim-rockin’ collection of assets and learning courses with the all-new GameDev.tv’s Game Jam Bundle! Unleash your inner creativity and develop your own fantasy RPG, first-person shooter, and more. This epic library contains all the vital creation lessons you need, from polygon creation to shading—unlock Blender Skill Builder Course: Modelling Challenges, Unreal Environment Design Course, and a massive assortment of asset packs. Pay what you want for industry-leading instruction and resources, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

item.title: Learn Intermediate Godot - Complete Course Bundle
item.content:encoded:
It’s time to take your game dev skills to a new frontier with a comprehensive bundle of intermediate-level Godot courses. Strengthen your existing knowledge with digestible and approachable lessons like Fighting Game in Godot with Local Multiplayer, Intermediate Godot - Essential Programming Patterns, Publishing to Steam for Godot Game Projects, and more! Build intermediate-level skills in Godot without breaking the bank and help support Girls Who Code when you shop with Humble Bundle!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 11th, 2027

item.title: Learn and Travel with Lonely Planet & uTalk
item.content:encoded:
With the World Cup approaching, let’s learn a new language and discover a new destination with a massive library of terrific travel resources. This world-spanning collaboration with Lonely Planet and uTalk is jam-packed with 80+ travel guides from local travel experts, revealing everything you need to plan a bucket list trip—experience the magic of Morocco, stretch your legs across Scotland, make new friends in Mexico, delve into the deep history of Japan, and so much more. Familiarize yourself with the words and cultures of Asia, Europe, and Africa with a curated collection of language courses with video!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before April 30th, 2027.

item.title: Big Phat Bangers Music Bundle
item.description: Big phat savings on big phat tunes
item.content:encoded: Create the perfect audioscape for your game, film, or creative project with this bundle of phat sounds from Phat Phrog Studio. This massive collection features 60+ video game-focused sounds in a variety of genres & styles ranging from RPG battle music to chill lofi tracks. Start your music creation journey or add to your existing library of beta-ready tunes. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and help support REVERB with your purchase. Plus, the top tier unlocks a 70% discount to the Phat Phrog Studio Store!

item.title: London Symphonic Strings Soloists Bundle
item.content:encoded: Elevate your orchestral compositions with the London Symphonic Strings Bundle, a premium collection of four highly detailed solo instruments: Violin, Viola, Cello, and Double Bass. Recorded in a stunning London concert hall, this library moves beyond typical samples and offers a deeply human performance quality of sound. With four distinct, mixable microphone perspectives, you can effortlessly shift your sound from an intimate studio tone to a soaring performance bathed in natural hall reverb! Pay what you want for the best string samples available and help support REVERB when you shop with Humble!

item.title: AWS Cloud Mastery Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Amaze yourself with what you’re capable of and start learning new, valuable cloud skills with the AWS Cloud Mastery Bundle! This curated collection by Packt is perfect for all skill levels—go from zero to hero with expert-led courses like Amazon S3 Deep Dive: The Ultimate Guide to AWS Cloud Storage, Intro to AWS - Your First Steps in Cloud Computing, and more. Arm yourself with the cloud skills you need to succeed in competitive fields and help support Cancer Research UK when you shop with Humble Bundle!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before May 4th, 2027.

item.title: Massive Game Dev Asset Collection
item.description: Any kind of asset you could imagine
item.content:encoded: Game developers—build the worlds you’ve always dreamed of with this bundle of ready-to-use assets from Bugrimov Maksim. Unlock fantasy-themed NPCs, creeping creatures, instruments of war, FPS weapon animations, and more. These asset packs are packed with professional-quality style and detail, helping you save time and money when you shop with Humble. Turn your RPG fantasies into reality with this massive collection of elite assets—and help support Save the Children with your purchase.

item.title: Wars & Wastelands Game Dev Bundle
item.description: Build War-Torn Worlds like a Pro!
item.content:encoded:
Get 500+ quality assets to create gritty conflict zones, post-apocalyptic landscapes, and cinematic combat scenes with the Wars and Wastelands bundle by KitBash3D. Featuring environments, props, and vehicles, this collection gives artists the tools to world build with speed and flexibility. From beginners to indie creators and major franchises like The Last of US, these fully customizable assets are built to fit into your workflow and deliver pro-level quality. Compatible with Unreal, Unity, and more. Stop wasting precious development time; get these A+ assets today and help support Girls Who Code.

Key expires. Please redeem before June 13th, 2026

item.title: The Ultimate 3D CAD Bundle: Your Vision. Your Home. Your Reality.
item.description: Design your life with CAD tools
item.content:encoded:
Give your imaginary designs life—start designing like a pro with our latest 3D CAD bundle! Pay what you want for powerful CAD software and take your grand design ideas from your imagination to the real world. This curated library is highlighted by the latest editions of the hottest software like Ashampoo 3D CAD Professional 14, Ashampoo Home Design 11, andAshampoo 3D CAD Architecture 14. Get help designing for specific spaces with ultra-useful kitchen and office catalog extensions!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before April 30th, 2027.

item.title: The Complete Works - a mammoth collection of royalty-free audio tracks by SideTrax
item.content:encoded: Calling all game devs, sound engineers, podcasters, and budding streamers—save big on your next game, video, and more with awesome royalty-free music! The right soundtrack sets the scene for your project; choose from 100+ vibe-setting music packs like full pop tracks, themed battle tunes, synthscapes, and techno beats. Stop worrying about your game’s audio production process and add professional-quality music tools to your personal collection. That's over 1500 tracks to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and help support Music Will with your purchase!

item.title: The Carnival Unreal Engine Megapack
item.description: Curated carnival assets just for you
item.content:encoded:
Bring joy and excitement to your next project with hyperrealistic carnival assets for Unreal Engine! Recreate an authentic carnival ambiance with assets so real your players will be able to smell the buttered corn popping. Give your characters routines and line your sidewalks with yummy food trucks and fun-filled shops. Fill your fairgrounds with massive, intricately detailed rides like bumper cars, haunted houses, Ferris wheels, carousels, and more. Get the assets you need to help bring your game to life, and help support One Tree Planted with your purchase!

Redeem through FAB. Professional License included.

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 27th, 2027

item.title: OpenClaw/ Make.com / n8n / Microsoft Automation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Looking for a leg up on the competition? Add a punch to your productivity with new, powerful AI tools taught by the pros at Mammoth Club! Get the most out of MyClaw, the open-source AI assistant that lives on your computer, with this intuitive learning course collection. Unlock lessons on foundational MyClaw skills, building email automation emails, generating sales leads, and so much more. But that’s not all—learn to master helpful Microsoft Power Platform tools too! Save time, money, and help support Make-A-Wish when you pick up this game-changing bundle.

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 23rd, 2027

item.title: Asset Store MEGA 15
item.description: Curated audio & visual assets just for you
item.content:encoded:
Fortify your asset library with this mega bundle of top-notch audio and video kits designed to save you time and effort. Add dynamic bursts of action with amazing adventure kits, make your spellcasters’ magical attacks pop with color and texture using master FX packs, and make every inch of your game’s environment feel lived-in with pro-quality sound effects kits—and so much more. Unlock your creative potential with this epic collection of powerful assets while helping support Girls Who Code when you shop with Humble Bundle.

Keys expire. Please redeem April 1st, 2027.

item.title: Dungeon Master's Adventures - 3D Printable Miniatures & Scenery
item.description: Bring your next campaign to life
item.content:encoded: Looking for new ways to immerse yourself and your players into your tabletop campaigns? This bundle has everything you need to (literally!) build a whole world ripe for exploration and mystery. This collection of 3D printable software from AlbinoRavenMini and Hayland Terrain has nearly 100 files you can use to craft anything from tiny creature figurines to entire buildings in which to pitch your battles. Among many other things, this bundle includes a dungeon terrain system, bat-winged goblin moonbows, demon tribes, a king on his throne, and hillside homes for your halflings. Before you launch your next campaign, build a world for your characters to inhabit by grabbing these 3D designs for the price of your choice! Every purchase supports Make-A-Wish!

item.title: Realer Than Reality - Scanned Material Bundle
item.content:encoded: Get over 120 8K High-Quality Scanned Materials in a single bundle! The world is a big place full of textures—and so is your work! Maybe you’ve recently found yourself in need of just the right concrete consistency or wood grain but haven’t stumbled upon the exact right one yet. Try out this bundle from ScansMatter full of photogrammetry scans of everyday materials you can use in your next art piece or model project! This library of scans includes brick walls, roads, plaster, concrete, wood, rocks, and more—all the everyday textures you’ve always wanted to incorporate into your work but never had the means to do so. Now you can, if you purchase this bundle at any price of your choosing! Every purchase supports the World Wildlife Fund, whose efforts ensure an abundance of living things continues to add texture to our own planet.

item.title: Learn To Make Games in Godot By GameDev.tv
item.content:encoded: Become a game dev mastermind when you harness the power of Godot! Learn how to create your own action RPG from the ground up with compelling combat mechanics, develop your own gravity-defying 3D platformer, build a 2D action-adventure game, and so much more with this curated bundle of approachable learning courses. Harness the power of Godot to bring your dream game to life, all for a price you choose. Unlock the very best from GameDev.TV and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase.

item.title: The Complete Agentic AI, Python, LLM & Robotics Mega Bundle+
item.content:encoded: Turn your curiosity about robotics into real-life skills with The Complete Agentic AI, Python, LLM & Robotics Mega Bundle! This open-source, engine-focused collection harnesses the approachable and practical power of Python to deliver clear results with big-time applications. Unlock first-time Humble Bundle exclusive courses like Introduction to Webots Robotic Simulator, Foundations of Robotics Simulation in Python, and Search and Rescue Drone Swarm Robots in Godot alongside 50+ additional can’t-miss courses. Keep your skills fresh and competitive, and help support One Tree Planted with your purchase.

item.title: Decibel Domination
item.description: The sonic power of Decibel Domination
item.content:encoded:
Set up an epic action scene with the perfect soundtrack for an action flick, chill out with an ambient music pack, or scare the hell out of your listeners with eerie horror tracks. Bring realism and character to the mundane corners of life with the Environmental Ambiences Sound FX Pack, or add a magical twist to your world with the Ambient Fantasy Music Pack! This curated library offers more than 1,000 unique tunes and tones for you to experiment with and costs a fraction of the retail price. Get the Decibel Domination Bundle today and help support the Children's Miracle Network.

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before April 9th, 2027.

item.title: Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets
item.content:encoded:
Dive into the latest asset collection that offers the widest range of stylized towns, buildings, and more with The Supreme 3 Best of Unity and Unreal Assets Bundle! Save time and money by accessing this pro-quality library of 75+ asset sets. Unlock exclusive terrain-scattering tools for awesome volcanic land environments, add color with retro Pop Art living spaces, give your starfighter’s technicians a realistic sci-fi engineering bay, and so much more. Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your game to life and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 12th, 2027.

item.title: The 2026 AWS, CompTIA, Azure, Google Cloud, Cybersecurity, and AI Certification Bundle
item.description: Certs’ up—don’t miss the digital wave
item.content:encoded: It’s time for a new job—develop the fundamental skills needed to prepare for career-changing exams with our latest Software Bundle. This comprehensive curriculum offers first-time exclusive Humble Bundle releases like AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer – Associate with 10 Practice Exams, Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals with 10 Practice Exams, and more. Ace your Amazon Web Services, CompTIA, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud certification exams with confidence, and help support Girls Who Code when you purchase prep resources from Humble Bundle.
